raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX I placed two orders on an online " comic book shop '', come to find out the shop doesnt exist and is just a scam. after reaching out several times over the course of a month, i finally decided to dispute charge after no response from the merchant. Almost a month later to have the disputes declined, then to be told my only option is to reach out to the merchant who has already been unresponsive. Now I am out {$400.00} and will be closing this card account as soon as possible. Would not recommend best buy Citi visa credit card to anyone
